mapper.select: SELECT d.*, dp.divide_no, dp.product_no, dp.type FROM divide d LEFT JOIN divide_product dp ON d.divide_no = dp.divide_no WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.is_delete = 0 AND dp.is_delete = 0
SELECT divide_no as no, divide_name as name, scene_no, priority, access_strategy_no, risk_strategy_no FROM divide WHERE scene_no = #{sceneNo} AND is_delete = 0 AND is_valid = 1 ORDER BY priority asc
SELECT divide_no as value, divide_name as `key` FROM divide WHERE is_valid = 1 AND is_delete = 0
